hero.name: I'm Rahmat Waisi
hero.tagline: Building high-performance, scalable distributed systems that power millions of interactions.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am a Senior Back-End Engineer and Software Architect with over 5 years of professional experience designing high-scale production systems. Specializing in Go, PHP (Laravel), and distributed architectures, I focus on building reliable microservices and high-throughput event-driven applications.
about.bio2: I thrive at the intersection of clean architecture (SOLID principles) and pragmatic engineering—optimizing database bottlenecks, streamlining DevOps pipelines, and turning complex infrastructure challenges into maintainable solutions.

jobs.company: Leading International MarTech Platform - Ainfluencer (Remote — Canada)
bullets: Architected and scaled Laravel backend services processing 1M+ daily email events with high consistency.
Optimized API response times 10x (from 2s down to 200ms) utilizing advanced Redis caching and complex query optimization.
Designed and optimized over 300 RESTful API endpoints, successfully reducing server infrastructure load by 50%.
Owned mission-critical production releases for real-time chat modules and secure payment gateways.
Integrated User.com APIs for advanced marketing automation, contributing to a 35% increase in revenue.
Engineered backend services for the Nobaar web application, significantly enhancing system stability and scalability.
Refactored legacy controllers by strictly applying SOLID principles, increasing code reusability and maintainability.
Optimized over 100 complex SQL queries and 42 API endpoints to drastically reduce database latency.
Developed robust backend features using PHP/Laravel, improving core transactional workflows.
Built secure authentication and seamless checkout workflows, enhancing transactional reliability.
Developed backend features for an e-commerce eyewear platform, supporting complex order workflows and product management.
Deepened framework-level expertise in PHP and Laravel ecosystem through iterative feature shipping.
